mxlibrary.title: Neural Network Components
mxlibrary.tags: neural network machine learning deep learning transformer

mxlibrary: [ { "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"<b>Input/Output</b><br><font style="font-size:9px;opacity:0.7">(B, T, d)</font>\" style=\"rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#2196F3;strokeColor=#1565C0;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=12;arcSize=20;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry width=\"200\" height=\"50\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>", "w": 200, "h": 50, "title": "Input / Output", "tags": "input output io tensor" }, { "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"<b>Token Embedding</b><br><font style="font-size:9px;opacity:0.7">(B, T) → (B, T, d)</font>\" style=\"rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#4CAF50;strokeColor=#2E7D32;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=12;arcSize=20;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry width=\"200\" height=\"60\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>", "w": 200, "h": 60, "title": "Token Embedding", "tags": "embedding token word" }, { "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"<b>Multi-Head Attention</b><br><font style="font-size:9px;opacity:0.7">(B, T, d) → (B, T, d)</font>\" style=\"rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E91E63;strokeColor=#AD1457;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=12;arcSize=20;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry width=\"200\" height=\"70\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>", "w": 200, "h": 70, "title": "Multi-Head Self-Attention", "tags": "attention self-attention multi-head transformer mha" }, { "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"<b>Masked Multi-Head Attention</b><br><font style="font-size:9px;opacity:0.7">(B, T, d) → (B, T, d)</font>\" style=\"rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E91E63;strokeColor=#AD1457;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=12;arcSize=20;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry width=\"200\" height=\"70\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>", "w": 200, "h": 70, "title": "Masked Multi-Head Attention", "tags": "attention masked causal decoder" }, { "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"<b>Cross-Attention</b><br><font style="font-size:9px;opacity:0.7">Q from decoder, K/V from encoder</font>\" style=\"rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#EC407A;strokeColor=#C2185B;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=12;arcSize=20;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry width=\"200\" height=\"70\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>", "w": 200, "h": 70, "title": "Cross-Attention", "tags": "attention cross encoder-decoder" }, { "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"<b>LayerNorm</b>\" style=\"rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#00BCD4;strokeColor=#00838F;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;arcSize=20;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry width=\"200\" height=\"35\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>", "w": 200, "h": 35, "title": "Layer Normalization", "tags": "layernorm normalization norm" }, { "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"<b>Feed-Forward Network</b><br><font style="font-size:9px;opacity:0.7">(B, T, d) → (B, T, d)</font>\" style=\"rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FF9800;strokeColor=#EF6C00;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=12;arcSize=20;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry width=\"200\" height=\"60\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>", "w": 200, "h": 60, "title": "Feed-Forward Network", "tags": "ffn mlp feedforward linear" }, { "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"<b>Linear Projection</b><br><font style="font-size:9px;opacity:0.7">(B, T, d) → (B, T, V)</font>\" style=\"rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#9C27B0;strokeColor=#6A1B9A;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=12;arcSize=20;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry width=\"200\" height=\"60\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>", "w": 200, "h": 60, "title": "Linear Projection", "tags": "linear projection dense" }, { "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"<b>+</b>\" style=\"ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#607D8B;strokeColor=#37474F;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry width=\"40\" height=\"40\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>", "w": 40, "h": 40, "title": "Residual Add (+)", "tags": "residual add skip connection" }, { "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"<b>Softmax</b>\" style=\"rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#009688;strokeColor=#00695C;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=12;arcSize=20;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry width=\"200\" height=\"40\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>", "w": 200, "h": 40, "title": "Softmax", "tags": "softmax activation output" }, { "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"<b>Dropout</b><br><font style="font-size:9px;opacity:0.7">p = 0.1</font>\" style=\"rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#795548;strokeColor=#4E342E;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;arcSize=20;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry width=\"200\" height=\"40\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>", "w": 200, "h": 40, "title": "Dropout", "tags": "dropout regularization" }, { "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"<b>ReLU</b>\" style=\"rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FF5722;strokeColor=#D84315;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=12;arcSize=20;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry width=\"200\" height=\"40\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>", "w": 200, "h": 40, "title": "ReLU Activation", "tags": "relu activation gelu silu" }, { "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"<b>Positional Encoding</b>\" style=\"rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#CDDC39;strokeColor=#9E9D24;fontColor=#333333;fontSize=12;arcSize=20;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry width=\"200\" height=\"40\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>", "w": 200, "h": 40, "title": "Positional Encoding", "tags": "positional encoding position sinusoidal rope" }, { "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"<b>Loss Function</b><br><font style="font-size:9px;opacity:0.7">Cross-Entropy</font>\" style=\"rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F44336;strokeColor=#C62828;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=12;arcSize=20;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry width=\"200\" height=\"50\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>", "w": 200, "h": 50, "title": "Loss Function", "tags": "loss cross-entropy mse objective" }, { "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"<b>⊕</b>\" style=\"ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#78909C;strokeColor=#455A64;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry width=\"40\" height=\"40\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>", "w": 40, "h": 40, "title": "Concatenation", "tags": "concatenation concat merge" }, { "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"Encoder Layer\" style=\"swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#FAFAFA;strokeColor=#E0E0E0;fontColor=#333333;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;rounded=1;arcSize=8;swimlaneLine=0;shadow=0;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry width=\"320\" height=\"420\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>", "w": 320, "h": 420, "title": "Layer Container (Encoder)", "tags": "layer container encoder block group" }, { "xml": "<mxGraphModel><root><mxCell id=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"1\" parent=\"0\"/><mxCell id=\"2\" value=\"Decoder Layer\" style=\"swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#FAFAFA;strokeColor=#E0E0E0;fontColor=#333333;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;rounded=1;arcSize=8;swimlaneLine=0;shadow=0;\" vertex=\"1\" parent=\"1\"><mxGeometry width=\"340\" height=\"570\" as=\"geometry\"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel>", "w": 340, "h": 570, "title": "Layer Container (Decoder)", "tags": "layer container decoder block group" } ]
